member.name: T:System.Linq.AsyncEnumerableExtensions
member.summary: Provides compatibility helpers for working with sequences.

member.name: M:System.Linq.AsyncEnumerableExtensions.ToListAsync``1(System.Collections.Generic.IAsyncEnumerable{``0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Materializes an into a while honoring cancellation during enumeration.
member.typeparam: The type of items produced by the asynchronous sequence.
member.param: The asynchronous sequence to enumerate.
A token that can stop enumeration before all items have been read.
member.returns: A list containing the items yielded by in enumeration order.

member.name: T:StorageProviders.IStorageProvider
member.summary: Defines the storage operations that provider implementations expose so application code can work with files without depending on a specific backing service.
member.remarks: Implementations translate these operations to storage systems such as cloud object stores, file shares, or other durable stores while preserving consistent behavior for callers. Paths are provider-defined logical locations; callers should not assume they map to local file-system paths unless a provider documents that behavior.

member.name: M:StorageProviders.IStorageProvider.SaveAsync(System.String,System.Byte[],System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Saves binary content to a logical storage path with optional provider-specific metadata.
member.param: The provider-defined destination path for the stored content.
The bytes to persist.
Optional key/value metadata to associate with the stored object, or when no metadata is required.
to replace an existing object at ; to let the provider protect existing content.
A token that can cancel the save operation.
member.returns: A task that completes when the content has been accepted by the provider.

member.name: M:StorageProviders.IStorageProvider.SaveAsync(System.String,System.IO.Stream,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Saves stream content to a logical storage path with optional provider-specific metadata.
member.param: The provider-defined destination path for the stored content.
The readable stream whose current position is used as the start of the content to persist.
Optional key/value metadata to associate with the stored object, or when no metadata is required.
to replace an existing object at ; to let the provider protect existing content.
A token that can cancel the save operation.
member.returns: A task that completes when the content has been accepted by the provider.

member.name: M:StorageProviders.IStorageProvider.SaveAsync(System.String,System.Byte[],System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Saves binary content to a logical storage path when no metadata needs to be supplied.
member.param: The provider-defined destination path for the stored content.
The bytes to persist.
to replace an existing object at ; to let the provider protect existing content.
A token that can cancel the save operation.
member.returns: A task that completes when the content has been accepted by the provider.

member.name: M:StorageProviders.IStorageProvider.SaveAsync(System.String,System.IO.Stream,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Saves stream content to a logical storage path when no metadata needs to be supplied.
member.param: The provider-defined destination path for the stored content.
The readable stream whose current position is used as the start of the content to persist.
to replace an existing object at ; to let the provider protect existing content.
A token that can cancel the save operation.
member.returns: A task that completes when the content has been accepted by the provider.

member.name: M:StorageProviders.IStorageProvider.ReadAsStreamAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Opens stored content for reading without forcing providers to buffer the entire object in memory.
member.param: The provider-defined path of the stored object to read.
A token that can cancel the read operation before the stream is returned.
member.returns: A readable stream for the object at , or when the object does not exist.

member.name: M:StorageProviders.IStorageProvider.ReadAsByteArrayAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads stored content into memory for callers that need a byte-array representation.
member.param: The provider-defined path of the stored object to read.
A token that can cancel the read operation.
member.returns: The object content as a byte array, or when the object does not exist.

member.name: M:StorageProviders.IStorageProvider.GetFullPathAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolves a provider-defined path to the absolute used to address the stored object.
member.param: The provider-defined path to resolve.
A token that can cancel the path resolution operation.
member.returns: The absolute that identifies for the current provider.

member.name: M:StorageProviders.IStorageProvider.GetReadAccessUriAsync(System.String,System.DateTime,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a temporary read-access for a stored object when the provider supports delegated access.
member.param: The provider-defined path of the object to expose for reading.
The date and time after which the returned URI should no longer grant access.
A token that can cancel the URI creation operation.
member.returns: A read-access for the object, or when delegated access is not supported by the provider.

member.name: M:StorageProviders.IStorageProvider.GetReadAccessUriAsync(System.String,System.DateTime,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a temporary read-access and optionally suggests a download file name when the provider supports it.
member.param: The provider-defined path of the object to expose for reading.
The date and time after which the returned URI should no longer grant access.
The optional download name to request from the provider, or to keep the provider's default naming behavior.
A token that can cancel the URI creation operation.
member.returns: A read-access for the object, or when delegated access is not supported by the provider.

member.name: M:StorageProviders.IStorageProvider.ExistsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Determines whether an object exists at a provider-defined path before callers attempt operations that require it.
member.param: The provider-defined path to check.
A token that can cancel the existence check.
member.returns: when an object exists at ; otherwise, .

member.name: M:StorageProviders.IStorageProvider.EnumerateAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Enumerates stored object paths using optional prefix and extension filters.
member.param: An optional provider-defined path prefix used to narrow the enumeration scope.
Optional file extensions used to include only matching objects.
member.returns: An asynchronous sequence of provider-defined paths that match the supplied filters.

member.name: M:StorageProviders.IStorageProvider.EnumerateAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Enumerates stored object paths using optional prefix and extension filters while allowing cancellation during traversal.
member.param: An optional provider-defined path prefix used to narrow the enumeration scope.
Optional file extensions used to include only matching objects.
A token that can cancel enumeration while the provider is scanning storage.
member.returns: An asynchronous sequence of provider-defined paths that match the supplied filters.

member.name: M:StorageProviders.IStorageProvider.DeleteAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes the object at the specified provider-defined path.
member.param: The provider-defined path of the object to remove.
A token that can cancel the delete operation.
member.returns: A task that completes when the provider has processed the delete request.

member.name: M:StorageProviders.IStorageProvider.GetPropertiesAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves provider-neutral information about stored content so callers can inspect metadata without reading the object body.
member.param: The provider-defined path of the object whose properties should be retrieved.
A token that can cancel the property retrieval operation.
member.returns: A instance describing the stored object.

member.name: M:StorageProviders.IStorageProvider.SetMetadataAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Replaces or clears the provider-specific metadata associated with a stored object.
member.param: The provider-defined path of the object whose metadata should be updated.
The metadata to apply, or when metadata should be cleared or omitted according to provider behavior.
A token that can cancel the metadata update operation.
member.returns: A task that completes when the provider has processed the metadata update.

member.name: T:StorageProviders.StorageFileInfo
member.summary: Represents provider-neutral file details returned by .
member.param: The provider-defined object name used to infer values such as .

member.name: M:StorageProviders.StorageFileInfo.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Represents provider-neutral file details returned by .
member.param: The provider-defined object name used to infer values such as .

member.name: P:StorageProviders.StorageFileInfo.Name
member.summary: Gets the provider-defined object name used by callers to display or identify the stored file.

member.name: P:StorageProviders.StorageFileInfo.ContentType
member.summary: Gets the MIME type inferred from so callers can set response headers without duplicating content-type mapping logic.

member.name: P:StorageProviders.StorageFileInfo.LastModified
member.summary: Gets or sets the last time the provider reports that the stored object was modified.

member.name: P:StorageProviders.StorageFileInfo.CreatedOn
member.summary: Gets or sets the time the provider reports that the stored object was created.

member.name: P:StorageProviders.StorageFileInfo.Length
member.summary: Gets or sets the object length in bytes, allowing callers to reason about transfer size before reading content.

member.name: P:StorageProviders.StorageFileInfo.Metadata
member.summary: Gets or sets provider-specific metadata associated with the stored object.
